endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Subscriptions.Admin/offers/{offer}/offerDelegations
endpoints.description: Get the list of offer delegations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{OFFER}} with a real offer. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Subscriptions.Admin/offers/{offer}/offerDelegations/{offerDelegationName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{OFFER}} with a real offer. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{OFFERDELEGATIONNAME}} with a real offerdelegationname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Subscriptions.Admin/offers/{offer}/offerDelegations/{offerDelegationName}
endpoints.description: Create or update the offer delegation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{OFFER}} with a real offer. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{OFFERDELEGATIONNAME}} with a real offerdelegationname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Subscriptions.Admin/offers/{offer}/offerDelegations/{offerDelegationName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{OFFER}} with a real offer. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{OFFERDELEGATIONNAME}} with a real offerdelegationname.
